data.title: Jiang Ye
data.synopsis:
The protagonist Ning Que travels to a seemingly real Tang Dynasty world, only to find that it is a dangerous world of cultivation. He originally thought that he could live a life of luxury and become superior, but he finds that he had no talent for cultivation. Additionally, he witnessed the massacre of his entire family at the age of four and was hunted for thousands of miles. While escaping death, he picked up a black umbrella in a sea of ​​blood and corpses and found the infant Sangsang. In despair, he found the motivation to live. Unwilling to bow to fate, he takes the big black umbrella and Sangsang, and begins a thrilling counterattack.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Mao Ni's (猫腻) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Kun Tun Tianxia Zhi Zhang Men Guilai
Tensei Soushu no Hadou-tan: Subete wo Nomikomu Sakana to Haiagaru
転生宗主の覇道譚 ～すべてを呑み込むサカナと這い上がる～

data.title: Kun Tun Tianxia Zhi Zhang Men Guilai
title_synonyms: Tensei Soushu no Hadou-tan: Subete wo Nomikomu Sakana to Haiagaru
転生宗主の覇道譚 ～すべてを呑み込むサカナと這い上がる～
data.synopsis:
Fan Lingxiao, a gifted spirit pet master, was ambushed in the A-level sect promotion competition and devoured by his own spirit pet whale, Kun. When he woke up, he found himself reincarnated into a young man named "Liu Fengmang" who is imprisoned in the White Mansion. 

His sect, Lingxiao Pavilion, was also in dire straits. In order to find out the truth about the backlash of the spirit Kun and revive his sect, Fan Lingxiao takes his existing spirit pets and embarks on a new adventure with Gu Ling, Cheng Xi, and Yue Tong.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Amedama no Uta
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Amedama no Uta by BUMP OF CHICKEN.

titles.title: The Other Side of Deep Space

data.title: Shenkong Bi An
data.title_english: The Other Side of Deep Space
data.synopsis:
The new art of cultivating immortals with technology is rising, while the old art of cultivating immortals that has been passed down for thousands of years is gradually declining. Wang Xuan, a genius boy of the old art, accidentally joins the mysterious organization Secret Road. He seizes treasures, fights new art, fights immortals, and in a series of thrilling adventures, he peeks into the big secrets hidden in the old art. In order to cope with the huge crisis that is about to come, Wang Xuan does not hesitate to go deep into the universe and challenge the limits of his growth.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Chen Dong's (辰东) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Gag Mensou
data.synopsis: A short film by Shinichi Suzuki.

titles.title: Qing Chi Hong Xiaodou Ba! Shiwu Shijie
请吃红小豆吧！食物世界 第一季

data.title: Qing Chi Hong Xiaodou Ba! Shiwu Shijie
data.title_japanese: 请吃红小豆吧！食物世界 第一季
data.synopsis:
Have you ever wondered where uneaten food goes? Wasted food actually goes to a world that belongs only to food, which is simply called the "Food City." Food is cleaned, disinfected and repaired here, and then returns to the human world to "go to work" and reappear in human bowls! Red Bean is just a red bean that is not eaten day after day... But one day, an accident happened! While Red Bean was working diligently, a human diner suddenly got food poisoning, and Red Bean became the object of suspicion by the Food Inspection Bureau...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Tong Ling Fei 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
The prime minister of Guyu Kingdom's eldest daughter, Qian Yunxi, possesses superhuman abilities.  Since childhood, she has been viewed as unlucky, and she is compelled to marry into the Ye Palace.  When the prince Ye Youming sees how sincere and nice she is, he employs hundreds of tricks to demonstrate his generosity.  Because she believes the prince is malicious, Qian Yunxi argues with him.  Cohabitation turns into a tumultuous existence.

(Source: Bilibili)
data.background: Adaptation of Rou Rou's (肉肉) Chinese webtoon of the same title.

data.title: Bai Ri Cheng Cai
data.synopsis:
In the high tower world where money is paramount, follow the grassroots male protagonist to climb to the top of the tower and realize his counterattack plan of becoming rich in 100 days!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Jian Wang 3: Shen Jianxin de 365 Tian
The Man From Dao Xiang Cun

data.title: Jian Wang 3: Shen Jianxin de 365 Tian
data.title_english: The Man From Dao Xiang Cun
data.synopsis:
After Shen Jianxin returns to Daoxiang Village again, strange tales, unsolved cases, and outrageous inventions constantly appear... He and his partners embark on a new adventure.

(Source: Bilibili)

data.title: Xuan Jie Zhi Men
data.synopsis:
In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be different. As the adopted son of an aristocratic family, he is forced to embark on the road of a warrior to find the truth and redeem himself. From the four halls of Fengcheng to the struggle between sects, interests are entangled, and powerful enemies lurk. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realizes the power of his bloodline, which not only changes his own destiny, but also affects the future of many people.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Wang Yu's (忘语) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
The New Chronicles of Extraordinary Beings: Preface

data.title: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
data.title_english: The New Chronicles of Extraordinary Beings: Preface
data.synopsis:
Hao Ren was originally a young man who lived in a fourth-tier city and lived on the meager rent of an old house. When he went out to work, he accidentally became a "universe police officer." While he was still struggling to accommodate a group of abnormal creature tenants arranged by his superiors, his jurisdiction, the Dream Plane Universe, had already brewed a cosmic crisis. The mystery of the origin of abnormal creatures on Earth and the ruins of civilization in the Dream Plane Universe seem to be connected in some way. 

As Hao Ren's investigation deepened, the eldest son's world-destroying natural disaster, the goddess of creation fell, and one after another of the dusty and terrifying cases that had been buried for thousands of years bombarded his already useless brain circuit. Hao Ren gradually realized that he might not be able to slack off...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation based on a Chinese web novel of the same name, written by Yuan Tong (远瞳).

data.title: Cengjing You Yongshi
data.synopsis:
The contrastingly cute dragon, Al, the first king-killer in the demon world, who has a full combat score but is ready to die and longs for a happy retirement, bumps into the cunning human magician Le Fei, and accidentally becomes a super dad who raises Le Fei's son Dino. Will Dino be an ordinary and happy child, or will he bravely pick up the Warrior's Holy Sword and face his own destiny...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Xian Di Guilai
data.synopsis:
The young warrior Yun Qingyan disappeared from the world three years ago, but he was actually drawn into the immortal world for three thousand years! With his extraordinary talent, he became the Yun Emperor, one of the ten great immortal emperors. However, because he was tired of the intrigues in the immortal world and missed his family, he decided to return to the mortal world at all costs. 

Upon return to the mortal world, his parents and sister strangely disappeared, and due to an incident whilst traveling from the immortal world to the mortal world, he lost his magic weapon and his cultivation became almost zero. Major forces took this opportunity to hunt him down. The immortal emperor became the target of public criticism, and his family was in danger! Yun Qingyan relied on his extraordinary immortal emperor talent to refine pills and array formations, study and practice, and overwhelm his enemies. He embarks on an adventure to revive his family, find his relatives, and rectify the mortal world. 

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Feng Wuji Guang's (风无极光) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Open a Street Stall and Sell Vigorously

data.title: Kaiju Ditan Mai Dali
title_synonyms: Open a Street Stall and Sell Vigorously
data.synopsis:
Twenty years ago, numerous "Spiritual Ruins Gates" suddenly appeared all over the world. The spiritual energy gushing out of them would awaken the supernatural powers of those who came into contact with them. These people who awakened supernatural powers were called "Spirit Warriors". Among them, the "Space series" Spirit Warriors became the strongest because of their outstanding performance in the "Beast Tide Disaster" and the scarcity of their awakening. Jiang Nan grew up in an orphanage in Jiangcheng, Lingzhou. He aspired to become the top spiritual warrior since he was a child. At the age of sixteen, he awakened the strongest and rarest space-based supernatural power, becoming the second space-based supernatural power in Lingzhou. Our story begins here...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yi Qingfeng's (弈青锋) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Yu Ling Shi
data.synopsis:
This tells the story of a popular cartoonist who became famous for his comic book .B.King. However, he ran out of ideas after many years and could only rely on constantly abandoning his characters to attract attention. One day, he received a mysterious phone call and was absorbed into the world of B.King as a character named Wang Xiaoming. Thus, the Wang Xiaoming who now has the thoughts of the "creator," along with the characters he created, embarks on a fantasy adventure that could be described as, "God's shortcut, one step to heaven."

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Kai Pai La! Guaishou Da Dianying

data.title: Kai Pai La! Guaishou Da Dianying
data.synopsis:
Following a decline in the amount of monster movies created, Meng Qi, a director who is obsessed with the monster movie genre, becomes unsure about his persistence—he never expected that one day an actual monster would appear in front of him! In order to fulfill his dream, Meng Qi decides to cooperate with the demon girl Liya and help her shoot a demon themed movie. However, as the shooting progresses, Meng Qi discovers that things in the other world are closely related to him...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Da Xia Qing Shang Gong
data.synopsis:
Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by "chaos." Murong Qiong formed a demon sect to fight against it, but they could not win despite the hard battle. The messenger of God Yi Zhihua came and taught everyone the demonization skills to successfully defeat the chaos. But the messenger of God left, and the demonization skills were introduced into the martial arts world and got out of control. Murong Qiong was disappointed and retired. His subordinate Yu Huabing took the opportunity to take over, improved the demonization skills, and created the punk invigoration era, making the martial arts world prosperous, but the price was that the martial artists all became "superior martial arts monsters." Dongfang Sheng, a young man with a pure heart, found Murong Qiong who had retired to the Xiangxi Hotel, hoping to rely on him to restore the former glory of the martial arts world. Thus this ridiculous story begins...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Lao Ma Yu Xiao Bai
data.synopsis:
Lao Ma, whose full name is Ma Lei and whose online name is "Ma Mou Ren", is a well-known game planner. Many of his mobile games have dominated the top of the "Lemon Best-selling" TOP list for many years. Lao Ma's production style is actually not well received in the game circle, but big companies are still flocking to him, and the core lies in the word traffic. Lao Ma's games have no breakthroughs in mechanism, and most of the games he planned are just reskins, but Lao Ma has a deep grasp of people's hearts, and often a simple small change can make players enjoy krypton gold. On an ordinary and easy-going morning in 2021, this well-known planner was fatefully transported into the mobile game world he designed himself. At first, he went smoothly with his understanding of the game, but gradually things began to collapse more and more. The bad design he made in order to cheat produced all kinds of amazing and strange changes. In addition to Lao Ma himself "enjoying" all this, there is also a new finger named "Xiao Bai" beside him...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Wei Miao Rensheng
data.synopsis:
Ji Miaomiao, a young woman just starting her career, is betrayed by a friend and left with a mountain of debt. While fleeing from ruthless debt collectors, she accidentally falls from a building. On the brink of death, a mysterious figure transforms her into a cat.

By a twist of fate, she ends up being adopted—by none other than her own boss, Lu Chengze. Thus begins her strange and magical 100-day life... as a cat.

(Source: Bilibili)

data.title: Dadao Duxing: Die Long Bian
data.synopsis:
Luo Li has been trapped in the soulless Yinzhou Continent since he was a child and became the number one killer of Tianjue Killing Hall. His father, Master Ciyun, sacrificed himself to buy Luo Li a chance to escape from Yinzhou and go to Zhongtian Main World to find the true way to cultivate immortality.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Wu Wai Jiangshan's (雾外江山) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Vigilante: Boku no Hero Academia Illegals
ヴィジランテ -僕のヒーローアカデミア ILLEGALS-

data.title: Vigilante: Boku no Hero Academia Illegals
data.title_japanese: ヴィジランテ -僕のヒーローアカデミア ILLEGALS-
data.synopsis:
In a world filled with superpowered Quirk users, college student Kouichi Haimawari's dream is to become a hero just like the ones he so admires. Unfortunately for him, he finds out that there is only so much he can do with a sliding ability that gives him about as much speed as a bicycle. Thus, he is drawn to extra-legal, simpler work and takes on various local tasks beyond the grasp of the police and licensed heroes.

However, a chance encounter with two misfits, a brash brawler vigilante who goes by Knuckleduster and the online sensation Pop☆Step, gives Kouichi the opportunity he has always dreamed about. With a dangerous new Quirk-enhancing drug turning ordinary people into instant villains, Kouichi finds himself accompanying the two in a quest to stop the drug from spreading. As the trio tries to get to the bottom of the case, the chaotic team looks to put a stop to wrongdoers that go overlooked by the law.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Gaming Party Xmas (maeshima soshi Remix)
data.synopsis: Music video for the maeshima soshi remix of Gaming Party Xmas by Zettakun.

data.synopsis: Second season of Sai-Kyo-Oh! Zukan: The Ultimate Battles.

data.title: Da Wang Rao Ming 3
data.synopsis:
The Great Demon King Lü Shu returns from the ruins of Qingzhou and goes to the capital to report on his duties. A new overseas adventure awaits him. Together with the Tian Luo Di Wang organization, Lü Shu travels to Thailand and Japan to begin a new cultivation journey.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
